data.name: ALL_Caster_Addle_Desc
data.value: Prevents the use of Addle when target already has the effect by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: ALL_Caster_Addle_Name
data.value: Magical Ranged DPS：Double Addle 防重复

data.name: ALL_Caster_Menu_Desc
data.value: Features and options involving shared role actions for Magical Ranged DPS.

data.name: ALL_Caster_Menu_Name
data.value: 全局 Magical Ranged 功能

data.name: ALL_Caster_Raise_Desc
data.value: Changes the class' Raise Ability into Swiftcast. Red Mage will also show VerCure if Swiftcast is on cooldown.

data.name: ALL_Caster_Raise_Name
data.value: Magical Ranged DPS: Raise 功能

data.name: ALL_Caster_Raise_Retarget_Desc
data.value: 会将此处涉及的复活技能重定向到你的治疗目标栈。

data.name: ALL_Healer_EsunaRetargeting_Desc
data.value: Retargets Esuna (outside of combo usage) to your Heal Stack, checking if each potential target in the stack has a cleansable debuff.

data.name: ALL_Healer_Menu_Desc
data.value: Features and options involving shared role actions for Healers.

data.name: ALL_Healer_Raise_Desc
data.value: Changes the class' Raise Ability into Swiftcast.

data.name: ALL_Healer_Raise_Retarget_Desc
data.value: 会将此处涉及的复活技能重定向到你的治疗目标栈。

data.name: ALL_Healer_RescueRetargeting_Desc
data.value: Retargets Rescue (outside of combo usage) to UI Mouseover and additional options.

data.name: ALL_Melee_Feint_Desc
data.value: Prevents the use of Feint when target already has the effect by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: ALL_Melee_Menu_Desc
data.value: Features and options involving shared role actions for Melee DPS.

data.name: ALL_Melee_Menu_Name
data.value: 全局 Melee DPS 功能

data.name: ALL_Melee_TrueNorth_Desc
data.value: Prevents the use of True North when its buff is already active by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: ALL_Ranged_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: Replaces Foot Graze with Head Graze when target can be interrupted.

data.name: ALL_Ranged_Interrupt_Name
data.value: Physical Ranged DPS: Ranged Interrupt 功能

data.name: ALL_Ranged_Menu_Desc
data.value: Features and options involving shared role actions for Physical Ranged DPS.

data.name: ALL_Ranged_Menu_Name
data.value: 全局 Physical Ranged 功能

data.name: ALL_Ranged_Mitigation_Desc
data.value: Prevents the use of Tactician/Troubadour/Shield Samba when target already has one of those three effects by replacing them with Savage Blade.

data.name: ALL_Ranged_Mitigation_Name
data.value: Physical Ranged DPS：Double Mitigation 防重复

data.name: ALL_Tank_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: Replaces Low Blow (Stun) with Interject (Interrupt) when the target can be interrupted. For PLDs this feature will add Shield Bash when Interject and Low Blow are on cooldown.

data.name: ALL_Tank_Interrupt_Retarget_Desc
data.value: Will retarget the interrupt if the caster is not your current target.

data.name: ALL_Tank_Menu_Desc
data.value: Features and options involving shared role actions for Tanks.

data.name: ALL_Tank_Reprisal_Desc
data.value: Prevents the use of Reprisal when target already has the effect by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: ALL_Tank_ShirkRetargeting_Desc
data.value: Retargets Shirk to the other tank if there is one.

data.name: ALL_Tank_ShirkRetargeting_Fallback_Desc
data.value: Will Retarget Shirk to tanks or healers, per your setting above, but will include a fallback to any tank OR healer if none of your setting is found. Useful to help your Shirk always go to *someone* even if your chosen players are not alive.

data.name: ALL_Tank_ShirkRetargeting_Healer_Desc
data.value: Will Retarget Shirk to healers, instead of the other tank. Only recommended during some specific enrages.

data.name: ASTPvP_Burst_Desc
data.value: Turns Fall Malefic into an all-in-one damage button.

data.name: ASTPvP_Burst_DoubleGravity_Desc
data.value: 将 Double Gravity Cast 加入爆发模式。

data.name: ASTPvP_Burst_DoubleMalefic_Desc
data.value: 将 Double Malefic Cast 加入爆发模式。

data.name: ASTPvP_Burst_DrawCard_Desc
data.value: 将 Drawing Cards 加入爆发模式。

data.name: ASTPvP_Diabrosis_Desc
data.value: 在低于设定生命值时，将 Role Action Diabrosis 加入爆发模式。

data.value: Pools your dps cards for the Divination window

data.name: AST_AOE_DPS_EarthlyStar_Desc
data.value: 将 Earthly Star placement, but not detonation, 加入循环。 Will be targeted to your focus target, then soft and hard targets, before falling back to placing it at your feet.

data.value: Add Lightspeed before Divination. Combine with Lightspeed Hold Options to ensure you have a charge to use

data.value: Holds Lord of Crowns for the Divination window

data.value: 简易输出模式 - 群体

data.name: AST_Benefic_Desc
data.value: Changes Benefic 2 to Benefic when Benefic 2 is not unlocked or available.

data.name: AST_Cards_QuickTargetCards_Desc
data.value: When you play the Balance or Spear in a combo, this will automatically target the buff on to a party member. It will look at DPS that suit the card first, following The Balance's priorities; if none found or they have buffs already, will look at the other DPS instead. Will try to skip party members that have damage downs or rez sickness. Will default to you if no suitable party members were found.

data.name: AST_DPS_AutoPlay_Desc
data.value: Weaves your Balance or Spear card (best used with Quick Target Cards)

data.name: AST_DPS_CardPool_Desc
data.value: Pools your dps cards for the Divination window

data.name: AST_DPS_LazyLord_Name
data.value: Lord of Crowns Weave 选项

data.value: Add Lightspeed before Divination Combine with Lightspeed Hold Options to ensure you have a charge to use

data.value: Holds Lord of Crowns for the Divination window

data.value: Blocks the Lightspeed Button while buff is active.

data.name: AST_Mit_AoE_Desc
data.value: Changes Collective Unconscious into Neutral Sect/Sun Sign and/or Aspected Helios/Helios Conjuction for shield after use.

data.name: AST_Mit_ST_Desc
data.value: Changes Exaltation into Essential Dignity and/or Celestial Intersection after use. 每个动作都可以通过下方的重定向功能进行重定向。

data.name: AST_Raidwide_AspectedHelios_Desc
data.value: Additionally, Will try to cast Aspected Helios with Neutral Sect Buff for shields when a raidwide casting. Will be used in all 4 main combos.

data.name: AST_Raidwide_CollectiveUnconscious_Desc
data.value: Additionally, Will try to Weave Collective Unconscious when a raidwide casting. Will be used in all 4 main combos.

data.name: AST_Raidwide_Desc
data.value: Collection of tools designed to try and cast during a raidwide attack when detected. This will work for most, but not all raidwide attacks and is no substitute for learning the fight

data.name: AST_Raidwide_NeutralSect_Desc
data.value: Additionally, Will try to Weave Neutral Sect and Sun sign when a raidwide casting. Will be used in all 4 main combos.

data.name: AST_Raidwide_NeutralSect_Name
data.value: RaidWide Neutral Sect Combo 选项

data.name: AST_Retargets_Benefic_Desc

data.name: BLMPvP_BurstMode_Desc
data.value: Turns Fire into an all-in-one button. - Uses Blizzard spells while moving (One Button Mode only). - Will use Paradox when appropriate.

data.name: BLMPvP_Burst_Desc
data.value: Uses Burst when available. - Requires target to be within range.

data.name: BLMPvP_ElementalStar_Desc
data.value: Uses Elemental Star when available. - Prioritizes Flare Star unless expiring.

data.name: BLMPvP_ElementalWeave_Desc
data.value: Uses Wreath of Fire when available. - Requires player's HP to be at or above:

data.name: BLMPvP_Lethargy_Desc
data.value: Uses Lethargy when available. - Will not use against non-players. - Requires target's HP to be under:

data.name: BLMPvP_Manipulation_Feature_Desc
data.value: Adds Purify when affected by crowd control. - Requires Purify to be available.

data.name: BLMPvP_PhantomDart_Desc
data.value: 当 Phantom Dart (if selected) 可用且生命值低于设定阈值时使用。

data.name: BLMPvP_Xenoglossy_Desc
data.value: Uses Xenoglossy when available. - Requires target's HP to be under:

data.name: BLM_Aetherial_Manipulation_Desc
data.value: Replaces Aetherial Manipulation with Between the Lines when you are out of active Ley Lines and standing still.

data.name: BLM_AmplifierXeno_Desc
data.value: Replaces Amplifier with Xenoglossy when at max Polyglot stacks.

data.name: BLM_AoE_AdvancedMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Blizzard II 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: BLM_AoE_Blizzard4Sub_Desc
data.value: Substitutes Freeze for Blizzard 4 whenever it would hit 2 targets.

data.name: BLM_AoE_Blizzard4Sub_Name
data.value: Blizzard IV on 2 Targets 选项

data.name: BLM_AoE_ParadoxFiller_Desc
data.value: 将 Paradox as a filler at max level 加入循环。

data.name: BLM_AoE_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Blizzard II 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: BLM_AoE_Thunder_Desc
data.value: Add (High) Thunder II to the rotation.

data.name: BLM_B1toB4_Desc
data.value: Replaces Blizzard I with Blizzard IV when available.

data.name: BLM_B1toB4_Name
data.value: Blizzard I to Blizzard IV 功能

data.name: BLM_Between_The_LeyLines_Desc
data.value: Replaces Ley Lines with Between the Lines when Ley Lines is active.

data.name: BLM_Between_The_LeyLines_Name
data.value: Between the Ley Lines 功能

data.name: BLM_Blizzard1and3_Desc
data.value: Replaces Blizzard I or Blizzard III with the options below.

data.name: BLM_Blizzard4toDespair_Desc
data.value: Replaces Blizzard IV with Despair when in Astral Fire.

data.name: BLM_F1toF4_Desc
data.value: Replaces Fire I with Fire IV when available.

data.name: BLM_F1toF4_Name
data.value: Fire I to Fire IV 功能

data.name: BLM_Fire1and3_Desc
data.value: Replaces Fire I or Fire III with the options below.

data.name: BLM_Fire4_Desc
data.value: Replaces Fire IV with the options below.

data.name: BLM_FlareParadox_Desc
data.value: Replaces Flarestar with Fire Paradox when not at max Flarestar stacks.

data.name: BLM_Flare_Desc
data.value: Replaces Flare with the options below.

data.name: BLM_FoulThunder_Desc
data.value: Replaces Foul with Thunder II when Thunder is 3 secs or lower.

data.name: BLM_Freeze_Desc
data.value: Replaces Freeze with Ice Paradox when you have 3 Umbral Heart stacks. Changes Freeze to Blizzard II when synched down.

data.name: BLM_Retargetting_Aetherial_Manipulation_Desc
data.value: Retargets Aetherial Manipulation to UI/Field Mouseover

data.name: BLM_ScatheXeno_Desc
data.value: Replaces Scathe with Xenoglossy when available.

data.name: BLM_ST_Addle_Desc
data.value: 检测到团伤读条时加入 Addle。

data.name: BLM_ST_AdvancedMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Blizzard I 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: BLM_ST_FlareStar_Desc
data.value: Add Flare Star to the rotation.

data.name: BLM_ST_Manaward_Desc
data.value: Adds Manaward to the rotation when solo and below HP treshold or when a raidwide is casting.

data.name: BLM_ST_Opener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。

data.name: BLM_ST_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Blizzard I 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: BLM_ST_Triplecast_Desc
data.value: Add Triplecast to the rotation. Will only be used if Swiftcast is on cooldown.

data.name: BLM_TriplecastProtection_Desc
data.value: Replaces Triplecast with Savage Blade when you already have triplecast active.

data.name: BLM_UmbralSoul_Desc
data.value: Replaces Transpose with Umbral Soul when Umbral Soul is available.

data.name: BLM_XenoThunder_Desc
data.value: Replaces Xenoglossy with Thunder when Thunder is 3 secs or lower.

data.name: BLU_Addle_Desc
data.value: Turns Magic Hammer into Addle when off cooldown.

data.name: BLU_BuffedSoT_Desc
data.value: Turns Song of Torment into Bristle so Song of Torment is buffed.

data.name: BLU_DebuffCombo_Desc
data.value: Puts Devour, Off-Guard, Lucid Dreaming, and Bad Breath into one button when under Tank Mimicry.

data.name: BLU_FinalSting_Desc
data.value: Turns Final Sting into the buff combo of: Moon Flute > Tingle > Whistle > Final Sting. Feather Rain is Retargeted to your target, so you don't have to place it.

data.name: BLU_HydroPull_Desc
data.value: Uses Hydro Pull before using Ram's Voice.

data.name: BLU_KnightCombo_Desc
data.value: Turns Black Knight's Tour or White Knight's Tour into its counterpart when the enemy is under the effect of the spell's debuff.

data.name: BLU_LightHeadedCombo_Desc
data.value: Turns Peripheral Synthesis into Mustard Bomb when target is under the effect of Lightheaded.

data.name: BLU_MeleeCombo_Desc
data.value: Turns Sonic Boom into Sharpened Knife when in melee range.

data.name: BLU_NewMoonFluteOpener_Desc
data.value: Turns Moon Flute into a full opener. Use the remaining 2 charges of Winged Reprobation before starting the opener again! Can be done with 2.50 spell speed. Feather Rain is Retargeted to your target, so you don't have to place it.

data.name: BLU_NewMoonFluteOpener_DoTOpener_Desc
data.value: Changes the opener to apply either Mortal Flame or Breath of Magic instead of using Winged Reprobation. Requires 2.20 or faster spell speed

data.name: BLU_Opener_Desc
data.value: Turns Moon Flute into a full opener. Here for historical value; level 80 opener is more potent. Feather Rain is Retargeted to your target, so you don't have to place it.

data.name: BLU_PeatClean_Desc
data.value: Changes Deep Clean to Peat Pelt if current target is not inflicted with Begrimed.

data.name: BLU_PerpetualRayStunCombo_Desc
data.value: Turns Perpetual Ray into Sharpened Knife when target is stunned and in melee range.

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_Desc
data.value: Turns Feather Rain into Shock Strike, Rose of Destruction, and Glass Dance. Will cause primals to desync from Moon Flute burst phases if used on cooldown. Feather Rain is Retargeted to your target, so you don't have to place it.

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_JKick_Desc
data.value: 将 J Kick 加入连招。

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_Matra_Desc
data.value: 将 Matra Magic 加入连招。

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_PhantomFlurry_Desc
data.value: 将 Phantom Flurry 加入连招。

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_Pool_Desc
data.value: Holds spells if Moon Flute burst is about to occur and spells are off cooldown.

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_Pool_Name
data.value: Moon Flute Burst Pooling 选项

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_SeaShanty_Desc
data.value: 将 Sea Shanty 加入连招。

data.name: BLU_PrimalCombo_WingedReprobation_Desc
data.value: 将 Winged Reprobation 加入连招。

data.name: BLU_Primals_Desc
data.value: 将 Rose of Destruction, Feather Rain, Glass Dance, and J Kick 加入连招。 Feather Rain is Retargeted to your target, so you don't have to place it.

data.name: BLU_SoloMode_Desc
data.value: Uses Basic Instinct if you're in an instance and on your own.

data.name: BLU_Ultravibrate_Desc
data.value: Turns Ultravibration into Ram's Voice if Deep Freeze isn't on the target. Will swiftcast Ultravibration if available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_BannerOfHonedAcuity_Desc
data.value: Use Banner of Honed Acuity when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_BannerOfHonoredSacrifice_Desc
data.value: Use Banner of Honored Sacrifice when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_BannerOfNobleEnds_Desc
data.value: Use Banner of Noble Ends when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_BannerOfSolemnClarity_Desc
data.value: Use Banner of Solemn Clarity when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_BannerOfTirelessConviction_Desc
data.value: Use Banner of Tireless Conviction when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_Desc

data.name: Bozja_Tank_LostAethershield_Desc
data.value: Use Lost Aether Shield when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_LostBloodRage_Desc
data.value: Use Lost Blood Rage when available.

data.value: Use Lost Cure II when available.

data.name: Bozja_Tank_LostCure3_Desc

data.value: Includes Devilment in the AoE rotation. Will activate only during Technical Finish if you're Lv70 or above. Will be used on cooldown below Lv70.

data.value: Includes Fan Dance 3 when under Threefold Fan Dance.

data.value: Includes Fan Dance 4 when under Fourfold Fan Dance.

data.name: DNC_AoE_Adv_FanProccs_Desc

data.value: Include all dance steps, and Finish, and optionally Standard Step, in the AoE rotation.

data.name: DNC_AoE_Adv_TS_Desc
data.value: Include all dance steps, and Finish, and optionally Technical Step, in the AoE rotation.

data.name: DNC_DesirablePartner_Desc

data.name: DNC_ST_Adv_DawnDance_Name
data.value: Dance of the Dawn 选项

data.value: Includes Devilment in the rotation. Will activate only during Technical Finish if you're Lv70 or above. Will be used on cooldown below Lv70.

data.value: Includes Fan Dance 3 when under Threefold Fan Dance.

data.value: Includes Fan Dance 4 when under Fourfold Fan Dance.

data.name: DNC_ST_Adv_Feathers_Desc

Weaves feathers outside of burst when target is below set HP percentage (Set to 0 to disable). Weaves feathers whenever available when under Lv.70.

data.value: Includes Finishing Move in the rotation.

data.value: Includes Improvisation in the rotation when available. Will not use while under Technical Finish

data.name: DNC_ST_Adv_LD_Desc
data.value: Includes Last Dance in the rotation.

data.name: DNC_ST_Adv_PanicHeals_Desc

data.name: DNC_ST_Adv_Partner_Desc

data.value: Uses Peloton when you are out of combat, do not already have the Peloton buff and are performing Standard Step with greater than 5s remaining of your dance.

data.name: DNC_ST_Adv_SaberDance_Desc

data.name: DNC_ST_BalanceOpener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。 Requirements: - Standard Step ready - Technical Step ready - Devilment ready (Will change to Savage Blade to wait for the countdown) (REQUIRES a countdown)

data.name: DNC_ST_BasicCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Fountain with its combo chain.

data.name: DNC_ST_BlockFinishes_Desc
data.value: Will hold Standard Finish and Technical Finish until an enemy is within range of the abilities in all (non-Simple) Modes and Features below by replacing whatever button with Savage Blade. Will show either Finish when the dance is about to expire. This behavior is recommended by The Balance but can introduce drift, so it may not be what is best for your group.

data.name: DNC_ST_BlockFinishes_Name
data.value: Require Nearby Enemy for Finishes 功能

data.name: DNC_ST_FanDanceOvercap_Name

data.name: DNC_ST_MultiButton_Desc

data.name: DNC_ST_Opener_BlockEarly_Desc
data.value: When not in combat will change to Savage Blade to wait for a countdown to appear. Mostly here to allow for targeting the boss before the exact countdown window your opener selection is waiting for. ONLY designed to be something you turn on while doing back-to-back pulls of content, NOT suitable to leave on all the time.

data.name: DRG_ST_Damage_Desc
data.value: 主连招上的输出技能集合。

data.name: DRG_ST_DragonfireDive_Desc
data.value: 将 Dragonfire Dive 加入循环。

data.name: DRG_ST_Feint_Desc
data.value: 检测到团伤读条时加入 Feint。

data.name: DRG_ST_LanceCharge_Desc
data.value: 将 Lance Charge 加入循环。

data.name: DRG_ST_LifeSurge_Desc
data.value: 将 Life Surge, on the proper GCD, 加入循环。

data.name: DRG_ST_Mirage_Desc
data.value: 将 Mirage Dive 加入循环。

data.name: DRG_ST_Opener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。

data.name: DRG_ST_RangedUptime_Desc
data.value: Adds Piercing Talon to the rotation when you are out of melee range.

data.name: DRG_ST_RiseOfTheDragon_Desc
data.value: 将 Rise of the Dragon 加入循环。

data.name: DRG_ST_RiseOfTheDragon_Name
data.value: Rise of the Dragon 选项

data.name: DRG_ST_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 True Thrust 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: DRG_ST_StunInterupt_Desc
data.value: 当非 Boss 目标正在读条时加入 Leg Sweep。

data.name: DRG_ST_Wyrmwind_Desc
data.value: 将 Wyrmwind Thrust 加入循环。

data.name: DRG_TrueNorthDynamic_Desc
data.value: Adds True North before Chaos Thrust/Chaotic Spring, Fang And Claw and Wheeling Thrust when you are not in the correct position for the enhanced potency bonus.

data.name: DRKPvP_BlackestNight_Desc
data.value: 将 Blackest Night 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_Burst_Desc
data.value: Turns Souleater Combo into an all-in-one damage button.

data.name: DRKPvP_Impalement_Desc
data.value: 将 Impalement 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_PlungeMelee_Desc
data.value: Uses Plunge whilst in melee range, and not just as a gap-closer.

data.name: DRKPvP_Plunge_Desc
data.value: 将 Plunge 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_Rampart_Desc
data.value: 在低于设定生命值时，将 Defensive Role Action Rampart 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_SaltAndDarkness_Desc
data.value: 将 Salt and Darkness 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_SaltedEarth_Desc
data.value: 将 Salted Earth 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_Scorn_Desc
data.value: 将 Scorn 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRKPvP_Shadowbringer_Desc
data.value: 将 Shadowbringer 加入爆发模式。

data.name: DRK_AoE_Adv_Desc
data.value: 将 Unleash 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: DRK_AoE_BasicCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Stalwart Soul with its combo chain.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CDs_Desc
data.value: Collection of cooldowns to add to the rotation.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_BringerBurst_Desc
data.value: Pools Shadowbringer to use during even minute window bursts (after Disesteem).

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_Darkness_Desc
data.value: Adds Salt and Darkness to the rotation in the latter half of its duration.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_Delirium_Desc
data.value: Adds Delirium (or Blood Weapon at lower levels) to the rotation on cooldown and when Darkside is up.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_Disesteem_Desc
data.value: Adds Disesteem to the rotation when available.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_Drain_Desc
data.value: Adds Abyssal Drain to the rotation when you fall below the chosen HP.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_SaltStill_Desc
data.value: Requires to be at a stand-still and for combat to have been going on for >7 seconds to use Salted Earth, to try to make it be placed after you finish your pull.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_Salt_Desc
data.value: Adds Salted Earth and Salt and Darkness to the rotation on cooldown and when Darkside is up.

data.name: DRK_AoE_CD_Shadow_Desc
data.value: Adds Living Shadow to the rotation on cooldown and when Darkside is up.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: 当目标读条可打断时，将 Interject 加入循环。

data.name: DRK_AoE_Simple_Desc
data.value: 将 Unleash 替换为完整的一键群体循环。

data.name: DRK_AoE_Spenders_Desc
data.value: Collection of spenders (mana and blood) to add to the rotation.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Sp_BloodOvercap_Desc
data.value: Adds Quietus to the rotation when the blood gauge is above the chosen threshold.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Sp_Flood_Desc
data.value: Uses Flood of Shadow in burst, if Darkside is about to expire (<10s), if you have Dark Arts and use The Blackest Night, and outside of burst will spend to chosen MP limit.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Sp_ImpalementChain_Desc
data.value: Adds Impalement to the rotation when Delirium is active.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Sp_ManaOvercap_Desc
data.value: Uses Flood of Shadow if you are above 9,400 mana.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Sp_Quietus_Desc
data.value: Adds Quietus to the rotation when under Delirium, or just after Burst.

data.name: DRK_AoE_Stun_Desc
data.value: Adds Low Blow to the rotation when your target is casting.

data.name: DRK_Hidden_Desc
data.value: Collection of cheeky or encounter-specific extra options only available to those in the know. Do not expect these options to be maintained, or even kept, after they are no longer Current.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_BlackestNight_OnCD_Desc
data.value: Adds The Blackest Night when below HP threshold and targeted.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_BlackestNight_TB_Desc
data.value: Adds The Blackest Night when an incoming tankbuster is detected.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_BlackestNight_TB_Name
data.value: The Blackest Night Tankbuster 选项

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_DarkMind_Desc
data.value: Adds Dark Mind when an incoming tankbuster is detected. Will not overlap unless below set threshold or aligned with rampart.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_DarkMissionary_Desc
data.value: Adds Dark Missionary when raidwide casting is detected.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_Desc
data.value: Adds Mitigation to the combos when in a boss encounter.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_Oblation_Desc
data.value: Adds Oblation when an incoming tankbuster is detected.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_Rampart_Desc
data.value: Adds Rampart when an incoming tankbuster is detected. Will Not Overlap with Shadow Wall/Shadowed Vigil.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_Reprisal_Desc
data.value: Adds Reprisal when raidwide casting is detected.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_ShadowWall_Desc
data.value: Adds Shadow Wall/Shadowed Vigil when an incoming tankbuster is detected. Will not overlap with Rampart.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Boss_ShadowWall_Name
data.value: Shadow Wall/Shadowed Vigil Tankbuster 选项

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_Desc
data.value: Options for Advanced Combos' In-Combo Mitigation. Enable Mitigation in each Advanced Combo to use these options. (Simple Mode does not use these Options, instead Recommended Values in place of them)

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_ArmsLength_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 5 个或更多时加入 Arm's Length。

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_BlackestNight_Desc
data.value: Adds The Blackest Night when available. Will overlap with others. (does not respect the HP% slider above)

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_DarkMind_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 3 个或更多时加入 Dark Mind。

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_DarkMissionary_Desc
data.value: Adds Dark Missionary when 5 or more targets. Will overlap with others.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_Desc
data.value: Adds Mitigation to the combos when not in a boss encounter. Will not overlap separate options unless stated. Will not use mitigation in the first 15 seconds of a pull unless you are not moving.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_LivingDead_Desc
data.value: Adds Living Dead based on set health threshold.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_Oblation_Desc
data.value: Adds Oblation when 5 or more targets. Will overlap with others.

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_Rampart_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 3 个或更多时加入 Rampart。

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_Reprisal_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 5 个或更多时加入 Reprisal。

data.name: DRK_Mitigation_NonBoss_ShadowWall_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 5 个或更多时加入 Shadow Wall/Shadowed Vigil。

data.name: DRK_Mit_ArmsLength_Desc
data.value: 将 Arm's Length 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: DRK_Mit_DarkMind_Desc
data.value: 将 Dark Mind 加入一键减伤功能。 NOTE: even if disabled, will still try to use Dark Mind as the lowest priority.

data.name: DRK_Mit_DarkMissionary_Desc
data.value: 将 Dark Missionary 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: DRK_Mit_LivingDead_Max_Desc
data.value: Gives max priority to Living Dead when the Health percentage threshold is met.

data.name: DRK_Mit_Oblation_Desc
data.value: 将 Oblation 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: DRK_Mit_OneButton_Desc
data.value: Replaces Dark Mind with an all-in-one mitigation button.

data.name: DRK_Mit_Party_Desc
data.value: Replaces Dark Missionary with Reprisal when ready.

data.name: DRK_Mit_Rampart_Desc
data.value: 将 Rampart 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: DRK_Mit_Reprisal_Desc
data.value: 将 Reprisal 加入一键减伤功能。 NOTE: Will not use unless there is a target within range to prevent waste.

data.name: DRK_Mit_ShadowWall_Desc
data.value: 将 Shadow Wall / Vigil 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: DRK_Mit_TheBlackestNight_Desc
data.value: 将 The Blackest Night 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: DRK_oGCD_Delirium_Desc
data.value: Adds Delirium (or Blood Weapon) to the Feature.

data.name: DRK_oGCD_Desc
data.value: Adds selected oGCD abilities to Carve And Spit and Abyssal Drain.

data.name: DRK_oGCD_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: Adds Interject to the feature when your target's cast is interruptible.

data.name: DRK_oGCD_SaltAndDarkness_Desc
data.value: Adds Saltand Darkness to the Feature when under the effect of Salted Earth.

data.name: DRK_oGCD_SaltedEarth_Desc
data.value: Adds Salted Earth to the Feature.

data.name: DRK_oGCD_Shadow_Desc
data.value: Adds Living Shadow to the Feature.

data.name: DRK_RetargetShadowstride_Desc
data.value: Will retarget Shadowstride to your field or UI mouseover target (If Hostile) or the nearest hostile target to your mouseover target (If friendly).

data.name: DRK_Retarget_Oblation_Desc
data.value: Will Retarget Oblation outside of other combos to your MouseOver Target (or a friendly Hard Target).

data.name: DRK_Retarget_Oblation_DoubleProtection_Desc
data.value: Will change Oblation to Savage Blade when your target already has Oblation on them.

data.name: DRK_Retarget_Oblation_TT_Desc
data.value: If your target's target is not you, will Retarget Oblation onto them. (if you're not top aggro, and not mousing over or hard targeting an ally)

data.name: DRK_Retarget_TBN_Desc
data.value: Will Retarget The Blackest Night outside of other combos to your MouseOver Target (or a friendly Hard Target).

data.name: DRK_Retarget_TBN_Name
data.value: Retarget The Blackest Night 功能

data.name: DRK_Retarget_TBN_TT_Desc
data.value: If your target's target is not you, will Retarget The Blackest Night onto them. (if you're not top aggro, and not mousing over or hard targeting an ally)

data.name: DRK_ST_Adv_Desc
data.value: 将 Hard Slash 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: DRK_ST_BalanceOpener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。 Requirements: - Over 7,000 mana - 2 Shadowbringer charges ready - Living Shadow off cooldown - Delirium off cooldown - Carve and Spit off cooldown - Salted Earth off cooldown (supports TBN'ing during use or pre-pull)

data.name: DRK_ST_BasicCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Souleater with its combo chain.

data.name: DRK_ST_CDs_Desc
data.value: Collection of cooldowns to add to the rotation.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_BringerBurst_Desc
data.value: Pools Shadowbringer to use during even minute window bursts (after Disesteem).

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Bringer_Desc
data.value: Adds Shadowbringer to the rotation while Darkside is up. Will use all stacks on cooldown.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Darkness_Desc
data.value: Adds Salt and Darkness to the rotation in the latter half of its duration.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Delirium_Desc
data.value: Adds Delirium (or Blood Weapon at lower levels) to the rotation on cooldown and when Darkside is up. Will also spend 50 blood gauge if Delirium is nearly ready to protect from overcap.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Disesteem_Desc
data.value: Adds Disesteem to the rotation when available.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: 当目标读条可打断时，将 Interject 加入循环。

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Salt_Desc
data.value: Adds Salted Earth to the rotation while Darkside is up, will use Salt and Darkness if unlocked.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Shadow_Desc
data.value: Adds Living Shadow to the rotation when Darkside is up.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Spit_Desc
data.value: Adds Carve and Spit to the rotation while Darkside is up.

data.name: DRK_ST_CD_Stun_Desc
data.value: Adds Low Blow to the rotation when your target is casting. Not advised outside of overworld content, as it can waste a lot of Low Blows on un-stun-able enemies, etc. Will try to not use it in boss fights.

data.name: DRK_ST_RangedUptime_Desc
data.value: Adds Unmend to the rotation when you are out of range.

data.name: DRK_ST_Simple_Desc
data.value: 将 Hard Slash 替换为完整的一键单体循环。

data.name: DRK_ST_Spenders_Desc
data.value: Collection of spenders (mana and blood) to add to the rotation.

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_BloodOvercap_Desc
data.value: Adds Bloodspiller to the rotation before Souleater when the blood gauge is above the chosen threshold.

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_Bloodspiller_Desc
data.value: Adds Bloodspiller to the rotation when under Delirium, or just after Burst.

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_DarkArts_Desc
data.value: Will spend Dark Arts if your own The Blackest Night shield is active on you, except when saving for burst.

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_EdgeDarkside_Desc
data.value: Uses Edge of Darkness if Darkside is about to expire (<10s).

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_Edge_Desc
data.value: Uses Edge of Darkness in burst windows.

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_ManaOvercap_Desc
data.value: Uses Edge of Darkness if you are at or above 9,400 mana, except when saving for burst.

data.name: DRK_ST_Sp_ScarletChain_Desc
data.value: Adds the Scarlet Delirium combo chain to the rotation when Delirium is activated.

data.name: FSH_CastGig_Desc
data.value: Replaces Cast with Gig when diving.

data.name: FSH_CastHook_Desc
data.value: Replaces Cast with Hook when fishing

data.name: FSH_CastLight_ElectricCurrent_Desc
data.value: Replaces Cast Light with Electric Current when diving.

data.name: FSH_CastLight_ElectricCurrent_Name
data.value: Cast Light to Electric Current 选项

data.name: FSH_Chum_BaitedBreath_Desc
data.value: Replaces Chum with Baited Breath when diving.

data.name: FSH_Chum_BaitedBreath_Name
data.value: Chum to Baited Breath 选项

data.name: FSH_FishEyes_VitalSight_Desc
data.value: Replaces Fish Eyes with Vital Sight when diving.

data.name: FSH_FishEyes_VitalSight_Name
data.value: Fish Eyes to Vital Sight 选项

data.name: FSH_Mooch_SharkEye_Desc
data.value: Replaces Mooch with Shark Eye when diving.

data.name: FSH_Mooch_SharkEye_Name
data.value: Mooch to Shark Eye 选项

data.name: FSH_PrizeBounty_Desc
data.value: Replaces Prize Catch with Nature's Bounty when diving.

data.name: FSH_PrizeBounty_Name
data.value: Prize Catch to Nature's Bounty 选项

data.name: FSH_SnaggingSalvage_Desc
data.value: Replaces Snagging with Salvage when diving.

data.name: FSH_SurfaceTrade_Desc
data.value: Replaces Surface Slap with Veteran Trade when diving.

data.name: FSH_SurfaceTrade_Name
data.value: Surface Slap to Veteran Trade 选项

data.name: FSH_Swim_Desc
data.value: Replace fishing abilities with diving abilities when underwater

data.name: GNBPvP_BlastingZone_Desc
data.value: Adds Blasting Zone to 爆发模式 when under Threshold.

data.name: GNBPvP_Burst_Desc
data.value: Turns Solid Barrel Combo into an all-in-one damage button.

data.name: GNBPvP_Corundum_Desc
data.value: Adds Heart of Corundum to 爆发模式 under set health %.

data.name: GNBPvP_FatedCircle_Desc
data.value: Adds Fated Circle to rotation under No Mercy status.

data.name: GNBPvP_Rampart_Desc
data.value: 在低于设定生命值时，将 Defensive Role Action Rampart 加入爆发模式。

data.name: GNBPvP_RoughDivide_Desc
data.value: Adds Rough Divide to rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNBPvP_ST_Continuation_Desc
data.value: 将 Continuation 加入爆发模式。

data.name: GNBPvP_ST_GnashingFang_Desc
data.value: 将 Gnashing Fang 加入爆发模式。

data.name: GNB_AoE_Advanced_Desc
data.value: 将 Demon Slice 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: GNB_AoE_BasicCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Demon Slaughter with its combo chain.

data.name: GNB_AoE_Bloodfest_Desc
data.value: Adds Bloodfest into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_BowShock_Desc
data.value: Adds Bow Shock oninto the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_DoubleDown_Desc
data.value: Adds Double Down into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_FatedCircle_Desc
data.value: Adds Fated Circle into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: 当目标读条可打断时，将 Interject 加入循环。

data.name: GNB_AoE_NoMercy_Desc
data.value: Adds No Mercy into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_Reign_Desc
data.value: Adds Reign/Noble/LionHeart into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_Simple_Desc
data.value: 将 Demon Slice 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: GNB_AoE_SonicBreak_Desc
data.value: Adds Sonic Break into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AoE_Stun_Desc
data.value: Adds Low Blow to the rotation when your target is casting, interruptible or not.

data.name: GNB_AoE_Zone_Desc
data.value: Adds Danger/Blasting Zone into the AoE rotation when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_AuroraProtection_Desc
data.value: Locks out Aurora if Aurora's effect is on the target by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: GNB_BS_Bloodfest_Desc
data.value: Adds Bloodfest to Burst Strike when approrpiate.

data.name: GNB_BS_Continuation_Desc
data.value: Adds all Single-Target Continuation procs to Burst Strike when available.

data.name: GNB_BS_DoubleDown_Desc
data.value: Adds Double Down to Burst Strike when available.

data.name: GNB_BS_Features_Desc

data.name: GNB_BS_GnashingFang_Desc
data.value: Adds Gnashing Fang & its combo to Burst Strike when available.

data.name: GNB_BS_Hypervelocity_Desc
data.value: Adds only Hypervelocity to Burst Strike when available.

data.name: GNB_BS_Reign_Desc
data.value: Adds Reign/Noble/Lionheart to Burst Strike when available.

data.name: GNB_FC_Bloodfest_Desc
data.value: Adds Bloodfest to Fated Circle when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_FC_BowShock_Desc
data.value: Adds Bow Shock to Fated Circle when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_FC_Continuation_Desc
data.value: Adds Fated Brand to Fated Circle.

data.name: GNB_FC_DoubleDown_Desc
data.value: Adds Double Down to Fated Circle when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_FC_DoubleDown_NM_Desc
data.value: Adds Double Down to Fated Circle only when No Mercy is active.

data.name: GNB_FC_Features_Desc
data.value: Collection of Fated Circle related features.

data.name: GNB_FC_Reign_Desc
data.value: Adds Reign/Noble/LionHeart to Fated Circle when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_GF_Bloodfest_Desc
data.value: Adds Bloodfest to Gnashing Fang when available.

data.name: GNB_GF_BowShock_Desc
data.value: Adds Bow Shock to Gnashing Fang when available.

data.name: GNB_GF_BurstStrike_Desc
data.value: Adds Burst Strike on Gnashing Fang under No Mercy when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_GF_Continuation_Desc
data.value: Adds Continuation to Gnashing Fang when available.

data.name: GNB_GF_DoubleDown_Desc
data.value: Adds Double Down to Gnashing Fang under No Mercy when appropriate.

data.name: GNB_GF_Features_Desc

data.name: GNB_GF_Reign_Desc

data.name: GNB_GF_SonicBreak_Desc
data.value: Adds Sonic Break on Gnashing Fang under No Mercy when appropriate.

data.value: Adds Danger / Blasting Zone to Gnashing Fang when available.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_Boss_Camouflage_Desc
data.value: Adds Camouflage when tankbuster is detected. Will not overlap unless below set threshold or aligned with rampart.

data.value: Adds Mitigation to the combos when in a boss encounter. Will not overlap separate options unless stated.

data.value: Adds Heart Of Light when raidwide casting is detected.

data.value: Adds Heart Of Stone/Corundrum on CD when below threshold.

data.value: Adds Heart Of Stone/Corundrum when tankbuster is detected.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_Boss_HeartOfStone_TankBuster_Name

data.value: Adds Nebula/Great Nebula when tankbuster is detected. Will not overlap with Rampart.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_Boss_Reprisal_Desc
data.value: Adds Reprisal when raidwide casting is detected.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_Desc
data.value: Options for Advanced Combos' In-Combo Mitigation. Enable Mitigation in each Advanced Combo to use these options. (Simple Mode does not use these Options, instead Recommended Values in place of them)

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_ArmsLength_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 5 个或更多时加入 Arm's Length。

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_Aurora_Desc
data.value: Adds Aurora when 3 or more targets. Will overlap with other mits.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_Camouflage_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 3 个或更多时加入 Camouflage。

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_Desc
data.value: Adds Mitigation to the combos when not in a boss encounter. Will not overlap separate options unless stated. Will not use mitigation in the first 15 seconds of a pull unless you are not moving.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_HeartOfLight_Desc
data.value: Adds Heart of Light when 5 or more targets. Will overlap with others.

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_Reprisal_Desc

data.name: GNB_Mitigation_NonBoss_Superbolide_Desc

data.name: NIN_MudraProtection_Desc
data.value: Replaces with Savage Blade during Mudra Phase to help prevent manual usage Mudra fails.

data.name: NIN_Simple_Mudras_Alt_Desc
data.value: Puts mudras on to a single button following basic logic and finishes them with Ninjutsu. Ten = Hyosho Ranryu > Suiton if trick cd less than 20s > Raiton. Chi = Goka Mekkyaku > Huton if trick cd less than 20s > Katon. Jin = Doton

data.name: NIN_Simple_Mudras_Desc
data.value: Simplify the mudra casting to avoid failing.

data.name: NIN_ST_AdvancedMode_BalanceOpener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。 Requirements: - 2 mudra charges ready - Dokumori off cooldown. - Kunai's Bane off cooldown. - TenChiJin off cooldown. - Phantom Kamaitachi off cooldown. - Bunshin off cooldown. - Dream Within a Dream off cooldown. - Kassatsu off cooldown.

data.name: PLD_AoE_AdvancedMode_FoF_Desc
data.value: Adds Fight or Flight to Advanced Mode. - Uses on cooldown alongside Requiescat. - Target HP must be at or above:

data.value: Adds Holy Circle to Advanced Mode. - Uses only when under Divine Might.

data.name: PLD_AoE_AdvancedMode_Intervene_Desc
data.value: Adds Intervene to Advanced Mode. - Prefers to use during Fight or Flight. - Will not use during movement. - Amount of charges to keep:

data.value: Adds a minimum MP limit to Advanced Mode. - This is not recommended in most cases. - Player MP must remain at or above:

data.name: PLD_BlockForWings_Desc
data.value: Will block the main Combos with Savage Blade while Passage of Arms is still active, to prevent actions from those combos cancelling Passage of Arms early. This will leave it up to you to cancel Passage of Arms via other actions or movement (or letting it be used fully).

data.name: PLD_BlockForWings_Name
data.value: Block Combos for Passage of Arms

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_Boss_Bulwark_Desc

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_Desc
data.value: Options for Advanced Combos' In-Combo Mitigation. Enable Mitigation in each Advanced Combo to use these options. (Simple Mode does not use these Options, instead Recommended Values in place of them)

data.value: Adds Arm's Length when 5 or more targets

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_Bulwark_Desc
data.value: Adds Bulwark when 3 or more targets

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_Desc
data.value: Adds Mitigation to the combos when not in a boss encounter. Will not overlap separate options unless stated. Will not use mitigation in the first 15 seconds of a pull unless you are not moving.

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_HallowedGroundEmergency_Desc
data.value: Adds Hallowed Ground when in emergency health situation. Will likely be on coodown if using above setting as reccomended.

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_HallowedGround_Desc

data.value: Adds Rampart when 3 or more targets

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_Reprisal_Desc
data.value: 当目标数达到 5 个或更多时加入 Reprisal。

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_Sentinel_Desc
data.value: Adds Sentinel/Guardian when 5 or more targets

data.name: PLD_Mitigation_NonBoss_Sheltron_Desc
data.value: Adds Sheltron when available. Will overlap with others.

data.value: 将 Sentinel / Guardian 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: PLD_Mit_Sheltron_Desc
data.value: 将 Sheltron 加入一键减伤功能。

data.name: PLD_Requiescat_Options_Desc
data.value: Replaces Requiescat with all Requiescat-related actions. - Prioritizes Confiteor and Blade actions when available. - Uses Holy Spirit or Holy Circle when appropriate.

data.name: PLD_RetargetClemency_Desc
data.value: Will retarget Clemency according to following Suboptions

data.name: PLD_RetargetClemency_LowHP_Desc
data.value: Will Heal Lowest Health Party member until you fall below set threshold

data.name: PLD_RetargetClemency_MO_Desc
data.value: Adds UI mouseover to the priority. Above LowHP option.

data.name: PLD_RetargetCover_Desc
data.value: Will retarget Cover according to the following options

data.name: PLD_RetargetCover_LowHP_Desc
data.value: Will Cover the Lowest Health (by percentage) Party member when they fall below set threshold

data.name: PLD_RetargetCover_MO_Desc
data.value: Adds UI mouseover to the priority, above Low HP option in priority.

data.name: PLD_RetargetIntervene_Desc
data.value: Will retarget intervene to your field or UI mouseover target (If Hostile) or the nearest hostile target to your mouseover target (If friendly).

data.name: PLD_RetargetSheltron_Desc
data.value: Will use intervention on your Hard Target if target is a friendly party member, if not then Sheltron. - UI Mouseover > Hard target > Target's target > Self Sheltron

data.name: PLD_RetargetSheltron_MO_Desc
data.value: Adds UI mouseover to the priority.

data.name: PLD_RetargetSheltron_TT_Desc
data.value: Adds Target's Target to the priority when you do not have agro.

data.name: PLD_RetargetShieldBash_Desc
data.value: Redirects your Shield Bash to a stunnable enemy if your current target cannot be stunned.

data.name: PLD_ShieldLob_Feature_Desc
data.value: Replaces Shield Lob with Holy Spirit when available. - Must be under the effect of Divine Might or not moving.

data.name: PLD_ShieldLob_Feature_Name
data.value: Shield Lob / Holy Spirit 功能

data.name: PLD_SpiritsWithin_Desc
data.value: Replaces Spirits Within with Circle of Scorn when available.

data.name: PLD_SpiritsWithin_Name
data.value: Spirits Within / Circle of Scorn 功能

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_Atonement_Desc
data.value: Adds the Atonement chain to Advanced Mode. - Will be prioritized if buff is expiring.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_BalanceOpener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_BladeOfHonor_Desc
data.value: Adds Blade of Honor to Advanced Mode. - Uses after Blade of Valor.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_Blades_Desc
data.value: Adds Blade of Faith/Truth/Valor to Advanced Mode. - At lower levels, uses Holy Spirit instead.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_CircleOfScorn_Desc
data.value: Adds Circle of Scorn to Advanced Mode. - Uses only when in range of the target. - Prefers to use during Fight or Flight.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_Confiteor_Desc
data.value: Adds Confiteor to Advanced Mode. - At lower levels, uses Holy Spirit instead.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Fast Blade 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_FoF_Desc
data.value: Adds Fight or Flight to Advanced Mode. - Uses after Royal Authority during opener. - Afterward, on cooldown alongside Requiescat. - Target HP must be at or above:

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_GoringBlade_Desc
data.value: Adds Goring Blade to Advanced Mode. - Prefers to use after Requiescat.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_HolySpirit_Desc
data.value: Adds Holy Spirit to Advanced Mode. - Uses only when under Divine Might. - Will be prioritized if buff is expiring.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_Intervene_Desc
data.value: Adds Intervene to Advanced Mode. - Prefers to use during Fight or Flight. - Will not use during movement. - Amount of charges to keep:

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_MP_Reserve_Desc
data.value: Adds a minimum MP limit to Advanced Mode. - This is not recommended in most cases. - Player MP must remain at or above:

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_Requiescat_Desc
data.value: Adds Requiescat to Advanced Mode. - Uses after Fight or Flight.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_ShieldLob_Desc
data.value: Adds Shield Lob to Advanced Mode. - Uses only while out of melee range. - Will not override better actions.

data.name: PLD_ST_AdvancedMode_SpiritsWithin_Desc
data.value: Adds Spirits Within to Advanced Mode. - Prefers to use during Fight or Flight.

data.name: PLD_ST_BasicCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Rage Of Halone or Royal Authority with its combo chain.

data.name: PLD_ST_Interrupt_Desc
data.value: 当目标读条可打断时，将 Interject 加入循环。

data.name: PLD_ST_LowBlow_Desc
data.value: Adds Low Blow to the rotation when your target is casting. Not advised outside of overworld content, as it can waste a lot of Low Blows on un-stun-able enemies, etc. Will try to not use it in boss fights.

data.name: PLD_ST_LowBlow_Name
data.value: Interrupt with Low Blow 选项

data.name: PLD_ST_ShieldBash_Desc
data.value: Adds Shield Bash to the rotation when your target is casting. Not advised outside of overworld content, as it can waste a lot of GCDs on un-stun-able enemies, etc. Will try to not use it in boss fights.

data.name: PLD_ST_ShieldBash_Name
data.value: Interrupt with Shield Bash 选项

data.name: PLD_ST_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Fast Blade 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: PvP_EmergencyGuard_Desc
data.value: Uses Guard when your HP is under the set threshold.

data.name: PvP_EmergencyHeals_Desc
data.value: Uses Recuperate when your HP is under the set threshold and you have sufficient MP.

data.name: PvP_MashCancelRecup_Desc
data.value: Allows you to cancel your guard with Recuperate on the Guard button if health is low enough to not waste it.

data.name: PvP_MashCancel_Desc
data.value: Stops you cancelling your guard if you're pressing buttons quickly by replacing your buttons with Savage Blade.

data.name: PvP_QuickPurify_Desc
data.value: Uses Purify when afflicted with any selected debuff.

data.name: RDMPvP_BurstMode_Desc
data.value: Turns Jolt III into an all-in-one button. - Will not attempt to cast Jolt III while moving by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: RDMPvP_Corps_Desc
data.value: Uses Corps-a-corps when available. - Must remain within maximum range. - Requires Enchanted Riposte to be available.

data.name: RDMPvP_Dash_Feature_Desc
data.value: Adds Purify when affected by crowd control. - Requires Purify to be available.

data.name: RDMPvP_Displacement_Desc
data.value: Uses Displacement when available. - Will use when Scorch becomes available. - Requires target to be within melee range.

data.name: RDMPvP_Embolden_Desc
data.value: Uses Embolden when available. - Requires Enchanted Riposte to be available. - Will use alongside Corps-a-corps if enabled.

data.name: RDMPvP_Forte_Desc
data.value: Uses Forte when available. - Will not use outside combat. - Requires player's HP to be under:

data.name: RDMPvP_PhantomDart_Desc
data.value: 当 Phantom Dart (if selected) 可用且生命值低于设定阈值时使用。

data.name: RDMPvP_Resolution_Desc
data.value: Uses Resolution when available. - Will not use against non-players. - Requires target's HP to be under:

data.name: RDMPvP_Riposte_Desc
data.value: Uses Riposte and Scorch when available. - Requires melee range for Riposte Combo.

data.name: RDM_AoE_Corpsacorps_Desc
data.value: Add Corps-a-corps when available for DPS. Will retain a charge for gap-closing.

data.name: RDM_AoE_DPS_Desc
data.value: 将 Scatter 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: RDM_AoE_Engagement_Pooling_Desc
data.value: Prevents overcap but pools at least one charge for burst window.

data.name: RDM_AoE_Engagement_Saving_Desc
data.value: Will hold one charge for manual displacement usage.

data.name: RDM_AoE_HolyFlare_Desc
data.value: Adds Verflare and Verholy into the Aoe Rotation.

data.name: RDM_AoE_Lucid_Desc
data.value: Weaves Lucid Dreaming when your MP drops below the specified value.

data.name: RDM_AoE_Manafication_Desc
data.value: Add Manafication before Embolden for burst.

data.name: RDM_AoE_MeleeCombo_Desc
data.value: Addes Moulinet into the Aoe Rotation. Will use ST Melee combo below 52.

data.name: RDM_AoE_MeleeCombo_GapCloser_Desc
data.value: Use Corp-a-corps when out of melee range and you have enough mana to start the melee combo.

data.name: RDM_AoE_MeleeCombo_Target_Desc
data.value: Requires a target within 8 Yalms. Skill itself requires none usually, this is for the range check.

data.name: RDM_AoE_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Scatter 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。 To start the melee combo, you must be within melee range.

data.name: RDM_AoE_ThunderAero_Desc
data.value: Adds Verthunder 2 and Veraero 2 into the Aoe Rotation.

data.name: RDM_AoE_VerCure_Desc
data.value: Adds Vercure on self when solo or in a party with no healers.

data.name: RDM_AoE_ViceOfThorns_Desc
data.value: Add Vice of Thorns when available.

data.name: RDM_Balance_Opener_Desc
data.value: 在等级 100 时加入 Balance 起手。 Ensure your opener timeout setting is higher than your Veraero III cast time!!! **Standard Opener must move into melee range to use Corps/Engagement**

data.name: RDM_CorpsDisplacement_Desc
data.value: Replace Displacement with Corps-a-corps when out of range.

data.name: RDM_EmboldenManafication_Desc
data.value: Changes Embolden to Manafication when on cooldown or under the effect of anyones Embolden.

data.name: RDM_EmboldenProtection_Desc
data.value: Disables Embolden when buffed by another Red Mage's Embolden by replacing it with Savage Blade.

data.name: RDM_MagickBarrierAddle_Desc
data.value: Changes Magick Barrier to Addle when on cooldown. Will Display the lowest cooldown skill if both are on cooldown.

data.name: RDM_MagickBarrierAddle_Name
data.value: Magick Barrier to Addle 选项

data.name: RDM_MagickProtection_Desc
data.value: Disables Magick Barrier when buffed by another Red Mage's Magick Barrier by replacing it with Savage Blade. Applies to suboption for Addle as well.

data.name: RDM_Moulinet_Desc
data.value: Replaces Moulinet with the basic melee aoe combo.

data.name: RDM_Moulinet_GapCloser_Desc
data.value: Use Corp-a-corps when out of melee range and you have enough mana or Magicked Swordplay to start the melee combo

data.name: RDM_Moulinet_NoWaste_Desc
data.value: Replaces Moulinet with Savage Blade when resources are too low to complete combo

data.name: RDM_Moulinet_Weaves_Desc
data.value: Weave the following OGCDS in the melee combo

data.name: RDM_OGCDs_Desc
data.value: Replaces Fleche with Contre Sixte, Vice of Thorns, Prefulgence, Engagement, and 1 charge of Corps-a-corps.

data.name: RDM_Raise_Desc
data.value: Changes Swiftcast to Verraise when under the effect of Swiftcast or Dualcast.

data.name: RDM_Raise_Retarget_Desc
data.value: Will Retarget the Raise and Vercure affected here to your Heal Stack.

data.name: RDM_Raise_Vercure_Desc
data.value: If Swiftcast is on cooldown, change to Vercure to proc Dualcast.

data.name: RDM_Riposte_Desc
data.value: Replaces Riposte with the basic melee combo.

data.name: RDM_Riposte_GapCloser_Desc
data.value: Use Corp-a-corps when out of melee range and you have enough mana or Magicked Swordplay to start the melee combo

data.name: RDM_Riposte_NoWaste_Desc
data.value: Replaces Riposte with Savage Blade when resources are too low to complete combo

data.name: RDM_Riposte_Weaves_Desc
data.value: Weave the following OGCDS in the melee combo

data.name: RDM_ST_Addle_Desc
data.value: 检测到团伤读条时加入 Addle。

data.name: RDM_ST_Corpsacorps_Desc
data.value: Add Corps-a-corps when available for DPS. Will retain a charge for gap-closing.

data.name: RDM_ST_DPS_Desc
data.value: 将 Jolt 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: RDM_ST_Engagement_Pooling_Desc
data.value: Prevents overcap but pools at least one charge for burst window.

data.name: RDM_ST_Engagement_Saving_Desc
data.value: Will hold one charge for manual displacement usage.

data.name: RDM_ST_Lucid_Desc
data.value: Weaves Lucid Dreaming when your MP drops below the specified value.

data.name: RDM_ST_MagickBarrier_Desc
data.value: 检测到团伤读条时加入 Magick Barrier。

data.name: RDM_ST_Manafication_Desc
data.value: Add Manafication before Embolden for burst.

data.name: RDM_ST_MeleeCombo_Desc
data.value: Adds Zwerchhau & Redoublement. **Must be in melee range or have Gap close with Corps-a-corps enabled**

data.name: RDM_ST_MeleeCombo_GapCloser_Desc
data.value: Use Corp-a-corps when out of melee range and you have enough mana to start the melee combo.

data.name: RDM_ST_MeleeCombo_IncludeReprise_Desc
data.value: Adds Reprise when outside of range during the melee combo. Will retain enough mana in order to finish the current combo.

data.name: RDM_ST_MeleeCombo_IncludeRiposte_Desc
data.value: Adds Riposte to start the combo. Recommended for Auto Rotation. **Must be in melee range or have gap-close with Corps-a-corps enabled**

data.name: RDM_ST_MeleeCombo_MeleeCheck_Desc
data.value: Once the melee combo has started, don't switch away even if target is out of range.

data.name: RDM_ST_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Jolt 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。 To start the melee combo, you must be within melee range.

data.name: RDM_ST_VerCure_Desc
data.value: Adds Vercure on self when solo or in a party with no healers.

data.name: RDM_ST_ViceOfThorns_Desc
data.value: Add Vice of Thorns when available.

data.name: RDM_RetargetVercure_Desc
data.value: Will retarget Vercure according to following Suboptions

data.name: RDM_RetargetVercure_LowHP_Desc
data.value: Will Heal Lowest Health Party member until you fall below set threshold

data.name: RDM_RetargetVercure_MO_Desc
data.value: Adds UI mouseover to the priority. Above LowHP option.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_ArcaneCircle_Desc
data.value: Adds Arcane Crest to the main combo when under the set HP perecentage.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_DeathWarrant_Desc
data.value: Adds Death Warrant onto the main combo when Plentiful Harvest is ready to use, or when Plentiful Harvest's cooldown is longer than Death Warrant's. Respects Immortal Sacrifice Pooling Option.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_Desc
data.value: Turns Slice Combo into an all-in-one damage button. Adds Soul Slice to the main combo.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_Enshrouded_Communio_Desc
data.value: Adds Communio onto the main combo when you have 1 stack of Enshroud remaining. Will not trigger if you are moving.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_Enshrouded_DeathWarrant_Desc
data.value: Adds Death Warrant onto the main combo during the Enshroud burst when available.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_Enshrouded_Desc
data.value: Adds Lemure's Slice to the main combo during the Enshroud burst phase. Contains burst options.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_GrimSwathe_Desc
data.value: Add's Grim Swathe onto the main combo on cd

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_ImmortalPooling_Desc
data.value: Pools stacks of Immortal Sacrifice before using Plentiful Harvest. Also holds Plentiful Harvest if Death Warrant is on cooldown. Set the value to 3 or below to use Plentiful Harvest as soon as it's available.

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_ImmortalPooling_Name
data.value: Plentiful Harvest + Immortal Sacrifice Pooling 选项

data.name: RPRPvP_Burst_RangedHarvest_Desc
data.value: Adds Harvest Moon onto the main combo when you're out of melee range, the GCD is not rolling and it's available for use. Will also throw it when the enemy is under 12k health for execute

data.name: RPRPvP_Smite_Desc
data.value: 在低于设定生命值时，将 Role Action Smite 加入爆发模式。

data.name: RPR_AoE_AdvancedMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Spinning Scythe 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: RPR_AoE_ArcaneCircle_Desc
data.value: 将 Arcane Circle 加入循环。

data.name: RPR_AoE_ComboHeals_Desc
data.value: 将 Bloodbath 和 Second Wind 加入连招，并在生命百分比低于阈值时使用。

data.name: RPR_AoE_GrimSwathe_Desc
data.value: 将 Grim Swathe 加入循环。

data.name: RPR_AoE_Lemure_Desc
data.value: 将 Lemure's Scythe 加入循环。

data.name: RPR_AoE_PlentifulHarvest_Desc
data.value: 将 Plentiful Harvest 加入循环。

data.name: RPR_AoE_Reaping_Desc
data.value: 将 Grim Reaping 加入循环。 (Disabling this may stop the one-button combo working during enshroud)

data.name: RPR_AoE_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Spinning Scythe 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: RPR_AoE_SoulScythe_Desc
data.value: 将 Soul Scythe 加入循环。

data.name: RPR_AoE_SoulSow_Desc
data.value: Adds Soulsow to the rotation when out of combat and u dont have the buff.

data.name: RPR_AoE_StunInterupt_Desc
data.value: 当非 Boss 目标正在读条时加入 Leg Sweep。

data.name: RPR_AoE_WoD_Desc
data.value: 将 Whorl of Death 加入循环。

data.name: RPR_ArcaneCirclePlentifulHarvest_Desc
data.value: Replaces Arcane Circle with Plentiful Harvest when you have stacks of Immortal Sacrifice.

data.name: RPR_CommunioOnGGG_Desc
data.value: Adds Communio to Gibbet/Gallows and Guillotine.

data.name: RPR_CommunioOnGGG_Name
data.value: Communio on Gibbet/Gallows and Guillotine 功能

data.name: RPR_EnshroudCommunio_Desc
data.value: Turns Enshroud to Communio and Perfectio when available to use.

data.name: RPR_EnshroudCommunio_Name
data.value: Enshroud to Communio to Perfectio 功能

data.name: RPR_EnshroudProtection_Desc
data.value: Turns Enshroud into Gibbet/Gallows to protect Soul Reaver waste.

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_BloodSwatheCombo_Desc
data.value: Adds (Executioner's) Gibbet and Gallows on Blood Stalk. Adds (Executioner's) Guillotine on Grim Swathe.

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_BloodSwatheCombo_Name
data.value: Gibbet and Gallows/Guillotine on Blood Stalk/Grim Swathe 功能

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_Desc
data.value: Blood Stalk and Grim Swathe will turn into Gluttony when it is available.

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_Enshroud_Desc
data.value: Adds Enshroud combo (Void/Cross Reaping, Communio, Lemure's Slice, Sacrificium and Perfectio) on Blood Stalk and Grim Swathe.

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_Name
data.value: Gluttony on Blood Stalk/Grim Swathe 功能

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_OGCD_Desc
data.value: Adds Enshroud, Lemure's Slice and Sacrificium.

data.name: RPR_GluttonyBloodSwathe_Sacrificium_Desc
data.value: Adds only Sacrificium on Blood Stalk and Grim Swathe while enshrouded.

data.name: RPR_LemureOnGGG_Desc
data.value: Adds Lemure's Slice to Gibbet/Gallows and Lemure's Scythe to Guillotine.

data.name: RPR_Regress_Desc

data.name: RPR_Soulsow_Combat_Desc
data.value: Adds Soulsow to Harpe during combat when no target is selected.

data.name: RPR_Soulsow_Desc

data.name: SAMPvP_Zantetsuken_Desc

data.name: SAM_AoE_AdvancedMode_Desc

data.value: Collection of Cooldown features on main combo.

data.name: SAM_AOE_CDs_Ikishoten_Desc
data.value: Adds Ikishoten when at or below 50 Kenki. Will dump Kenki at 10 seconds left to allow Ikishoten to be used.

data.name: SAM_AoE_ComboHeals_Desc
data.value: 将 Bloodbath 和 Second Wind 加入连招，并在生命百分比低于阈值时使用。

data.name: SAM_AoE_Damage_Desc
data.value: 主连招上的输出技能集合。

data.name: SAM_AoE_Hagakure_Desc
data.value: Adds Hagakure to the rotation when there are three Sen.

data.name: SAM_AoE_MangetsuCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Mangetsu with its combo chain. Enabling Oka combo options makes this a one button basic combo.

data.name: SAM_AoE_MeikyoShisui_Desc
data.value: 将 Meikyo Shisui 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_AoE_OgiNamikiri_Desc
data.value: 将 Ogi Namikiri and Kaeshi: Namikiri when ready and when you're not moving 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_AoE_OkaCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Oka with its combo chain.

data.name: SAM_AoE_Oka_Desc
data.value: 将 Oka combo 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_AoE_Shoha_Desc
data.value: Adds Shoha when you have 3 meditation stacks.

data.name: SAM_AoE_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Fuga 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: SAM_AoE_StunInterupt_Desc
data.value: 当非 Boss 目标正在读条时加入 Leg Sweep。

data.name: SAM_AoE_TenkaGoken_Desc
data.value: 将 Tenka Goken, Midare: Setsugekka, and Kaeshi: Goken when ready and when you're not moving 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_GyotenYaten_Desc
data.value: Hissatsu: Gyoten becomes Yaten/Gyoten depending on the distance from your target.

data.name: SAM_Hidden_Desc
data.value: Collection of cheeky or encounter-specific extra options only available to those in the know. Do not expect these options to be maintained, or even kept, after they are no longer Current.

data.name: SAM_Iaijutsu_OgiNamikiri_Desc
data.value: Replace Iaijutsu with Ogi Namikiri and Kaeshi: Namikiri when buffed with Ogi Namikiri Ready.

data.name: SAM_Iaijutsu_Shoha_Desc
data.value: Replace Iaijutsu with Shoha when meditation is 3.

data.name: SAM_Iaijutsu_TsubameGaeshi_Desc
data.value: Replace Iaijutsu with Tsubame-gaeshi when appropriate.

data.name: SAM_Ikishoten_Namikiri_Desc
data.value: Replace Ikishoten with Ogi Namikiri & Kaeshi Namikiri when available.

data.name: SAM_Ikishoten_Shoha_Desc
data.value: Replace Ikishoten with Shoha when Meditation is full before Ogi Namikiri.

data.name: SAM_Kyuten_Guren_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Kyuten with Guren when off cooldown.

data.name: SAM_Kyuten_Ikishoten_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Kyuten with Ikishoten when off cooldown and Kenki is below 50.

data.name: SAM_Kyuten_Shoha_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Kyuten with Shoha when Meditation is full.

data.name: SAM_Kyuten_Zanshin_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Kyuten with Zanshin when usable.

data.name: SAM_MeikyoSens_Desc
data.value: Replace Meikyo Shisui with Gekko, Kasha, and Yukikaze depending on what is needed.

data.name: SAM_MeikyoShisuiProtection_Desc
data.value: Blocks Meikyo Shisui with Savage Blade when you already have Meikyo Shisui active.

data.name: SAM_OgiShoha_Desc
data.value: Ogi Namikiri becomes Shoha when u have 3 meditation stacks.

data.name: SAM_SeneiGuren_Desc
data.value: Hissatsu: Senei becomes Hissatsu : Guren when synched below lvl 72.

data.name: SAM_Shinten_Ikishoten_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Shinten with Ikishoten when off cooldown and Kenki is below 50.

data.name: SAM_Shinten_Senei_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Shinten with Senei when off cooldown.

data.name: SAM_Shinten_Shoha_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Shinten with Shoha when Meditation is full.

data.name: SAM_Shinten_Zanshin_Desc
data.value: Replace Hissatsu: Shinten with Zanshin when usable.

data.name: SAM_ST_AdvancedMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Hakaze 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 These features are ideal if you want to customize the rotation.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_Desc
data.value: Collection of Cooldown features on main combo.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_Iaijutsu_Desc
data.value: 将 Midare: Setsugekka, Higanbana, and Kaeshi: Setsugekka 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_Iaijutsu_Movement_Desc
data.value: Adds Midare: Setsugekka and Higanbana when you're not moving.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_Ikishoten_Desc
data.value: Adds Ikishoten when at or below 50 Kenki. PRE 94: Will dump Kenki at 10 seconds left to allow Ikishoten to be used. POST 94: Will use during burst window.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_MeikyoShisui_Desc
data.value: 将 Meikyo Shisui 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_OgiNamikiri_Desc
data.value: 将 Ogi Namikiri and Kaeshi: Namikiri 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_Shoha_Desc
data.value: Adds Shoha when you have three meditation stacks.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_UseHiganbana_Desc
data.value: Will use Higanbana depending on suboptions.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_UseMidare_Desc
data.value: Will use Midare Setsugekka and Tendo Setsugekka.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_UseTenkaGoken_Desc
data.value: Will Use Tenka Goken when lvlsynched below lvl 50.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_UseTsubame_Desc
data.value: Will use Tsubame-gaeshi and Tendo Kaeshi Setsugekka.

data.name: SAM_ST_CDs_Zanshin_Desc
data.value: 将 Zanshin when ready 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_ST_ComboHeals_Desc
data.value: 将 Bloodbath 和 Second Wind 加入连招，并在生命百分比低于阈值时使用。

data.value: 主连招上的输出技能集合。

data.name: SAM_ST_Feint_Desc
data.value: 检测到团伤读条时加入 Feint。

data.name: SAM_ST_GekkoCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Gekko with its combo chain.

data.name: SAM_ST_Gekko_Desc
data.value: 将 Gekko combo 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_ST_KashaCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Kasha with its combo chain.

data.name: SAM_ST_Kasha_Desc
data.value: 将 Kasha combo 加入循环。

data.name: SAM_ST_Meditate_Desc
data.value: Adds Meditate when not moving, not having a target and being in combat.

data.name: SAM_ST_Opener_Desc
data.value: Adds the Balance opener at level 70/80/90/100.

data.name: SAM_ST_RangedUptime_Desc

data.name: SAM_ST_Shinten_Desc
data.value: 将 Shinten 加入循环。 Will pool kenki for burst.

data.name: SAM_ST_SimpleMode_Desc
data.value: 将 Hakaze 替换为完整的一键单体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: SAM_ST_StunInterupt_Desc
data.value: 当非 Boss 目标正在读条时加入 Leg Sweep。

data.name: SAM_ST_ThirdEye_Desc
data.value: Adds Third Eye when 团伤 is detected casting. When Solo, uses on cd.

data.name: SAM_ST_TrueNorth_Desc
data.value: Adds True North when you are not in the correct position for the enhanced potency bonus.

data.name: SAM_ST_YukikazeCombo_Desc
data.value: Replace Yukikaze with its combo chain. Enabling Gekko and Kasha combo options makes this a one button basic combo.

data.name: SAM_ST_Yukikaze_Desc
data.value: 将 Yukikaze combo 加入循环。

data.name: SCHPvP_Adlo_Desc
data.value: Adds Adloquium when target is below set health

data.name: SCHPvP_Biolysis_Desc
data.value: 将 Biolysis use on cooldown 加入爆发模式。

data.name: SCHPvP_Burst_Desc
data.value: Turns Broil IV into all-in-one damage button.

data.name: SCHPvP_ChainStratagem_Desc
data.value: Adds Chain Stratagem to 爆发模式 when available.

data.name: SCHPvP_DeploymentTactics_Desc
data.value: Adds Deployment Tactics to 爆发模式 when available.

data.name: SCHPvP_Diabrosis_Desc
data.value: 在低于设定生命值时，将 Role Action Diabrosis 加入爆发模式。

data.name: SCHPvP_Expedient_Desc
data.value: Adds Expedient to 爆发模式 to empower Biolysis.

data.name: SCHPvP_RetargetAdlo_Desc
data.value: Retargets Adlo to the heal stack (In Wrath Settings) outside of the Burst 功能

data.name: SCH_Aetherflow_Desc
data.value: Change Aetherflow-using skills to Aetherflow, Recitation, or Dissipation as selected.

data.name: SCH_Aetherflow_Dissipation_Desc
data.value: If Aetherflow is on cooldown, show Dissipation instead.

data.name: SCH_Aetherflow_Recite_Desc
data.value: Prioritizes Recitation usage on Excogitation or Indomitability.

data.name: SCH_AoE_ADV_DPS_Aetherflow_Desc
data.value: 在没有 Aetherflow 层数时使用 Aetherflow。

data.value: Adds Chain Stratagem on cooldown with overlap protection

data.value: 将 Art of War 替换为下方选项集合。

data.name: SCH_AoE_ADV_DPS_EnergyDrain_Desc
data.value: Use Energy Drain to consume remaining Aetherflow stacks when Aetherflow is about to come off cooldown.

data.name: SCH_AoE_ADV_DPS_FairyReminder_Desc
data.value: Adds Summon Eos whenever you've not summoned your fairy.

data.value: 将 Art of War 替换为完整的一键群体循环。 这是该职业新手的理想选项。

data.name: SCH_Consolation_Name
data.value: Fey Blessing to Seraph's Consolation 功能

data.name: SCH_DeploymentTactics_Desc
data.value: Changes Deployment Tactics to Adloquium until a party member has the Galvanize buff.

data.name: SCH_DeploymentTactics_Recitation_Desc
data.value: Adds Recitation when off cooldown to force a critical Galvanize buff on a party member.

data.name: SCH_FairyReminder_Desc
data.value: Change all fairy actions into Summon Eos when the Fairy is not summoned.

data.name: SCH_Fairy_Combo_Desc
data.value: Change Whispering Dawn into Fey Illumination, Fey Blessing, then Whispering Dawn when used.

data.name: SCH_Lustrate_Desc
data.value: Change Lustrate into Excogitation when Excogitation is ready.

data.name: SCH_Mit_AoE_Desc
data.value: Changes Sacred Soil into (optional Fey Illumination) then Succor or (Optional Self Targetted Recitation-Adloquium-Deployment Tactics) Finished with (Optional Expedient) and (Optional Seraph/Consolation) 可以通过下方的重定向功能进行重定向。

data.name: SCH_Mit_ST_Desc
data.value: Changes Protraction into (Optional Recitation)Adloquium followed by (Optional Deployment Tactics and Excogitation) 每个动作都可以通过下方的重定向功能进行重定向。

data.name: SCH_Raidwide_Desc
data.value: Collection of tools designed to try and cast during a raidwide attack when detected. This will work for most, but not all raidwide attacks and is no substitute for learning the fight

data.name: SCH_Raidwide_Expedient_Desc
data.value: Will try to use Expedient when a raidwide casting is detected. Will be used in all 4 Advanced combos.

data.name: SCH_Raidwide_SacredSoil_Desc
data.value: Will try to use Sacred Soil on self when a raidwide casting is detected. Will be used in all 4 Advanced combos

data.name: SCH_Raidwide_Succor_Desc
data.value: Will try to cast Succor when a raidwide casting is detected if shieldcheck from succor setting passes. Will be used in all 4 Advanced combos.

data.name: SCH_Raise_Desc
data.value: Changes Swiftcast to Resurrection while Swiftcast is on cooldown.

data.name: SCH_Raise_Retarget_Desc
data.value: Will Retarget the Raise affected here to your Heal Stack.

data.name: SCH_Recitation_Desc
